title: knautia drymeja
intro: Knautia drymeja, also known as the ragged roof or saw wort, is a flowering plant native to Europe and Western Asia. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Knautia drymeja can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often combined with other herbs to enhance their medicinal properties.
